name: Nubase
desc: 🔥🔥🔥 Turn AI-written code into real apps. Nubase is an open-source, AI-native backend platform for AI Coding, agentic applications, and modern product teams:…
descFull: 🔥🔥🔥 Turn AI-written code into real apps. Nubase is an open-source, AI-native backend platform for AI Coding, agentic applications, and modern product teams: Memory, Database, Storage, and Auth in one self-hostable service.
